mnemonics: Single Source of Truth (SSOT) - Like a town's central water tower (the state) that lifts water (data) up high so every house (component) below can access it with consistent pressure (props).
keyPoints: Lifting state moves shared state to the closest common ancestor component.
Data flows down from the parent via props, making it the 'single source of truth'.
Child components communicate back up by calling callback functions passed down as props.
commonMistakes: Lifting state too high in the component tree, causing unnecessary re-renders for components that don't need the data.
Forgetting to pass the necessary callback function as a prop to the child component, making it unable to update the parent's state.
